dialogue.intro: I was mid-match when I dropped my lucky controller grip somewhere on campus — haven't won a single round since. Not superstitious, just... very specific about my gear.
dialogue.reminder: Still no grip. My win rate is suffering, not that I'm counting.
dialogue.thanks: YES. Okay, back in the game — literally. Thank you, seriously.
dialogue.farewell: GG. Go show the crossroads what you're made of.

dialogue.intro: Somewhere between here and the plaza, I lost my lucky cleats. Can't play my best without them — every striker's got a thing, and that's mine.
dialogue.reminder: Still barefoot in spirit without those cleats.
dialogue.thanks: There they are! Back in form already. Appreciate you, truly.
dialogue.farewell: See you on the pitch someday. Thanks for the assist.

dialogue.intro: Dropped my keychain somewhere near the plaza — small thing, but it's got sentimental value. Can't drive anywhere without feeling like something's missing.
dialogue.reminder: Still missing that keychain. Doesn't feel right without it.
dialogue.thanks: There it is. Appreciate it — that one actually means a lot to me.
dialogue.farewell: Drive safe out there, wherever the crossroads takes you next.
